matrix.error_risk: Low (if reviewed by experts) / High (if reviewers are fatigued/junior)
matrix.best_for: Highly complex domain logic, cryptographic implementations, core architecture changes.

matrix.error_risk: Medium (Catches syntax/coverage, but misses logic/business flaws)
matrix.best_for: Formatting, linting, dependency vulnerability scanning, standard test validation.

matrix.time_per_pr: Medium (Automated gate must pass first, followed by focused human review)
matrix.error_risk: Extremely Low (Machine catches syntax, Human catches logic)
matrix.best_for: Standard enterprise software development at scale.
